posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Imagine never missing a school fee deadline again!

We’ve integrated Vapi AI assistant with our monday.com board to create an optimized, automated reminder system for parents.
Here’s how it works:

Student details are securely stored on our Monday. com board

VAPI AI connects with Monday. com to access parent contact info

Before fee due dates, parents receive personalized, AI-generated voice calls

The Future of Education with AI:

This automated reminder system is just the beginning. By leveraging AI, we’re not only enhancing administrative processes but also paving the way for a more efficient, personalized educational experience for students and parents alike.

If you’re looking to implement VAPI with Monday.com, feel free to contact us. Our team is here to assist you in creating innovative solutions that drive results.
